title: JINYA Ramen Bar
description: Full renovation and expansion of an existing 2-story mercantile building for a new high-end A-2 restaurant space. Included expanding the floor area with a newly constructed basement level and rooftop patio seating, while preserving the historic facade.

title: RAKU Sushi Restaurant
description: Complete interior transformation including custom millwork, new seating layouts, updated restrooms, decorative ceiling and wall features, and refined lighting.

title: TreMonti Office
description: Office tenant build-out featuring non-structural demountable partitions/doors (DIRTT MODULAR SYSTEM), metal stud framing, reception counters & millwork, ceilings, and finishes.

title: Mindspace Shared Office
description: Full renovation of an existing coworking suite including selective demolition, non-structural partitions, new glass wall systems, electrical upgrades, and finish improvements.

title: DJM Consulting Office
description: Tenant build-out of executive offices and conference rooms. Includes demolition of existing partitions, framing & drywall, reception millwork, and upgraded M/E/P.

title: American Eagle
description: Buildout for multiple American Eagle retail store locations across the DMV region.
